title: Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager Training
description:
This Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager training covers concepts from the Basic level to advance level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager training as per your pace.

Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager is a systems management software product developed by Microsoft for managing large groups of computers running Windows NT, Windows Embedded, macOS (OS X), Linux or UNIX, as well as Windows Phone, Symbian, iOS and Android mobile operating systems. Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager is an integrated solution for managing all your devices. Microsoft SCCM or System Center Configuration Manager is systems management software that enables administrators to manage both the deployment and security of devices and applications across an enterprise. Microsoft System Center Configuration Manager provides remote control, patch management, software distribution, operating system deployment, network access protection and hardware and software inventory.
